productDisplayName: Nike Men Hustle Reversible Black Shorts
description: Composition Black and grey reversible Basketball shorts for men, made of 100% polyester, has grey mesh stripes and panels on the sides, wide elasticated waistband with a drawstring, and nike swoosh printed on one side and appliquéd on the other side Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry on low Cool iron: do not iron on decorations Built with the breathable comfort and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike basketball shorts comes in a reversible design. These high-performance shorts created from soft polyester fabric wick sweat away from the body to keep you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with tees and basketball shoes.
